title: Faster Rockets Mod
description: This mod adds rockets, which are basically faster fireworks
body:
This mod adds faster rockets to the game:
![Hyper rocket usage example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a13bd812728cfc276c04896680733cc70dd36e02.png)
# Faster Fireworks

Faster Fireworks adds three progression-based Elytra rockets that launch you much harder than vanilla while keeping normal Firework Rockets unchanged.

## What It Adds

- **Swift Rocket**: `1.9x` boost, flight duration `2`, crafts `3`
- **Burst Rocket**: `2.35x` boost, flight duration `3`, crafts `2`
- **Hyper Rocket**: `2.85x` boost, flight duration `4`, crafts `1`

## Crafting Progression

- **Swift Rocket**: paper + gunpowder + redstone
- **Burst Rocket**: crafted from Swift Rockets + blaze powder + glowstone dust
- **Hyper Rocket**: crafted from Burst Rockets + phantom membranes + nether star

## Configurable

All tier values are configurable in:

`config/fasterrocketsmod.json`

Each tier has:

- `speedMultiplier` (clamped to `1.0` - `10.0`)
- `flightDuration` (clamped to `1` - `10`)

## Compatibility

- Minecraft `1.21.10`
- Fabric Loader `0.18.1+`
- Fabric API
- Java `21+`

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer. Vanilla Firework Rockets are unaffected.
